title: pilosella × bifurca subsp. praticola
intro: Pilosella × bifurca subsp. praticola, also known as a rare hybrid plant, is a subspecies of Pilosella bifurca, a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pilosella × bifurca subsp. praticola include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions, such as arthritis and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using it in tincture form, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
